S.FORM: == pacing == minbuqax na knus hiya' ga, hbkgan na pacing. mstmah qu baruh lga, hbkgan na pacing la.
S.PHON: == paʦ~ʨiŋ == minβuqax na knus~ɕ ħijaʔ ɣa, ħβkɣan na paʦ~ʨiŋ. ms~ɕtmaħ qu βaruħ lɣa, ħβkɣan na paʦ~ʨiŋ la.
S.FORM: == pacing == minbuqax na knus hiya' ga, hbkgan na pacing. mstmah qu baruh lga, hbkgan na pacing la.
S.PHON: == paʦ~ʨiŋ == minβuqax na knus~ɕ ħijaʔ ɣa, ħβkɣan na paʦ~ʨiŋ. ms~ɕtmaħ qu βaruħ lɣa, ħβkɣan na paʦ~ʨiŋ la.
